method: fake-dequant: quantize role weights to a Q3 proxy (per-32 asymmetric make_qkxn nmax=7), dequant to fp, substitute into the dense path, teacher-forced dNLL vs the unmodified model

rows.label: attn_q
rows.note: quality passes (dNLL ~0.0006) but only 1.7% decode bandwidth -> below the 5% worth-kernel threshold

q2_status: refuted at reconstruction (Phase 2: ~0.36 rel error, worst-row ~0.43); no Q2 dNLL run
verdict: REFUTED: every high-byte role (ffn_down +0.028, ffn_gate +0.022, ffn_up +0.026, attn_output +0.040) rejects dNLL>0.01 at Q3; the only quality-passing role (attn_q +0.0006) saves just 1.7% decode bandwidth. Q2 already refuted at reconstruction. No candidate passes dNLL<=0.01 AND >=5% bw -> bank sub4 as quality-refuted; do NOT build a Q3/Q2 GEMV kernel.
note: ffn_gate/ffn_up/attn_output are 1-window (already clearly >0.02, robust); ffn_down/attn_q re-confirmed over 3 windows after the single-window ffn_down value looked like a false pass. Multi-window mattered -- it caught the noise.
